untranslatable_reason: Signal requires stationarized time series (CN operator) and extreme threshold detection (mean ± 1.0 standard deviations). These advanced statistical transformations and normalized extreme value detection are not available in the allowed indicator set. The allowed indicators do not include custom stationarity operators, z-score calculations, or mean-reversion bands calibrated to stationarity measures. Substituted with SMA crossover as a pragmatic reversion proxy, but this does not accurately capture the signal's intent of detecting extremes in stationarized series.
translation_notes: ARONSON_DRY_0_2 is a sophisticated mean-reversion rule based on stationarity and extreme value transitions. Since stationarized series and z-score extremes cannot be expressed with allowed indicators, the rule has been approximated using SMA-based mean reversion. The 60-period lookback was mapped to a 20-period SMA (closest allowed match). True implementation requires custom stationarity calculations (detrending/differencing) not available in this indicator library.
